announcements.announcement_1: Welcome to Noyaku. New updates are available. Please update the app to access the latest features.
announcements.announcement_2: Text Mode is enabled by default. To translate Manga or Manhwa, switch to Image Mode by clicking the Book icon.
announcements.announcement_3: We have added a new subscription plan for $2.99, which includes 80 AI translations (approximately 30 chapters of daily reading).

tutorial_videos.metadata_1: Learn how to translate Manhwa and Webtoons
